name: UNIVERSAL HEALTH REALTY INCOME TRUST
business: Universal Health Realty Income Trust is a real estate investment trust that invests in healthcare and human service related facilities including acute care hospitals, behavioral health care hospitals, specialty facilities, free-standing emergency departments, childcare centers and medical/office buildings. It leases these properties to operators, with a substantial portion of revenue derived from leases to subsidiaries of Universal Health Services, Inc.
sellsTo: Healthcare providers and operators (hospitals, behavioral health centers, medical offices)
Subsidiaries of Universal Health Services, Inc.
namedCustomers: Universal Health Services, Inc. and its subsidiaries

exposures.sentence: There is a heightened risk of future cybersecurity threats, including ransomware attacks targeting healthcare providers.

catalysts.event: Completion of Palm Beach Gardens Medical Plaza I construction
catalysts.sentence: Construction commenced in February, 2026, and is expected to be completed during the fourth quarter of 2026.
